name: Dropbox
description: Inspect the current Dropbox account, retrieve file or folder metadata, traverse folders with cursor pagination, and search Dropbox content metadata.

auth.hint: Create a scoped app in the Dropbox App Console, complete the OAuth 2.0 flow, and provide its user access token. Enable account_info.read for account details and files.metadata.read for the selected file metadata operations.

tools.name: get_current_account
tools.description: Return details for the Dropbox account associated with the access token.

tools.name: get_metadata
tools.description: Return metadata for a file or folder by path, file ID, or revision.

params.name: path
params.description: Path, file or folder ID, or revision identifying the item.

params.name: include_media_info
params.description: Whether to include deprecated media information for files.

params.name: include_deleted
params.description: Whether to return DeletedMetadata when the referenced path has been deleted.

params.name: include_has_explicit_shared_members
params.description: Whether file metadata should indicate explicit shared members.

tools.name: list_folder
tools.description: List files and folders under a Dropbox path and obtain a cursor for additional pages or later changes.

params.name: path
params.description: Folder path; use an empty string for the app or account root.

params.name: recursive
params.description: Whether to include all descendants instead of only immediate children.

params.name: include_media_info
params.description: Whether to include deprecated media information for files.

params.name: include_deleted
params.description: Whether deleted entries should be included.

params.name: include_mounted_folders
params.description: Whether mounted folders should be traversed.

params.name: limit
params.description: Approximate maximum number of entries in the response page.

params.name: shared_link
params.description: Optional shared-link context used to list a linked folder.

tools.name: continue_folder_listing
tools.description: Continue a folder listing using the cursor returned by list_folder or a prior continuation.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Cursor returned by list_folder or the previous list_folder/continue response.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search Dropbox file and folder metadata for a query.

params.name: query
params.description: Search string, with a minimum length of one character.

params.name: options
params.description: Optional search configuration including path, maximum results, file status, extension filters, category filters, and filename-only matching.

params.name: match_field_options
params.description: Optional configuration for additional match fields in returned results.

params.name: include_highlights
params.description: Whether matches should include highlighted fragments.
